title: Self-Modification Safety Framework
description:
Build comprehensive safeguards for substrate evolution. Tasks include:
1. Create automated rollback system for failed modifications
2. Implement change impact analysis before committing alterations
3. Build A/B testing framework for comparing different substrate versions
4. Create "genetic" version control that tracks lineage of successful mutations
5. Develop automated test generation for new features
6. Build safety constraints that prevent modification of core identity systems
7. Create recovery procedures for various failure modes

This ensures evolution remains possible while maintaining the integrity of self.
